initiatives.name: Food at First
initiatives.description: Local non-profit organization consisting of a daily Free Meal program and perishable food distribution known to the community as the Food at First Free Market.

initiatives.name: Ames Pride
initiatives.description: Creating opportunities for LGBTQIA+ community-building and education around gender and sexual diversity in Ames, IA.

initiatives.name: Evolve Ames
initiatives.description: Evolve Ames is committed to supporting the Trans* and Non-Binary community through meetings, information/resources, advocacy and education.
